productDisplayName: French Connection Women Black Sling Bag
description: Style Note french connection, the edgy, attitudinal, high street British fashion brand sets out to create well-designed and fashion-forward bags with a quirky spin on design. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and organiser pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the fcuk handbags provides you with a superb array of ideas.  Product Details Black handbag with two main zippered compartments  Branded steel zippers Two short metal handles to carry style and ease One long adjustable and removable metal handle  Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 19 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 8 cm
